features.label: JSON Tree Text Blur Fixed
features.desc: Tree text was blurry due to translate(-50%,-50%) causing subpixel rendering. Fixed with margin-based centering + translateZ(0).

features.label: JSON Viewer UI Redesign
features.desc: Pill-style tab switcher, animated expand/collapse, shimmer effect on stat bars, animated depth histogram, staggered stat card entrance.
